RunSkeptic_method.flow: GATE -> FUNDAMENTAL SCAN -> MAP -> CONFIDENCE -> STABILIZE -> EVIDENCE -> DECIDE -> ACT -> VERIFY -> LEARN

deferred_items: changing unknown section default from SPEC_CANDIDATE to REVIEW_NEEDED

goal.summary: HLDspec should be a judge-led product that converts/inspects HLDs, classifies sections, extracts use-case/API evidence, builds safe SpecKit prework, stops at human checkpoints, and never invokes implementation without approval.
